speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Science and Tomorrow time, and researchers have discovered something pretty mind-blowing - literally. Scientists have found a hidden 'drain' system inside the human brain that removes waste. It's been caught in action using cutting-edge MRI scans.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] Researchers mapped how fluid flows along brain arteries in a slow, lymphatic-like pattern - completely different from blood flow. This could revolutionize how we understand and treat brain diseases like Alzheimer's and dementia.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And one for breakfast lovers - scientists have also cracked the mystery of a reactive molecule in vitamin B1, solving a decades-old puzzle about how our bodies actually use this essential vitamin. Science proving once again that cereal isn't just delicious, it's complicated too.
